title: Golmaal Again
tmdbOverview: Gopal and his best friends are back again, and this time they move back to their old neighborhood in a new palatial house where they learn that it is being haunted by a ghost.
synopsis: Golmaal Again is a 2017 comedy, horror and action film from India. It has a 5.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a UA certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
